ogTitle: Macorna North vs Madalya: Climate Safety

heading: Macorna North vs Madalya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macorna North, Victoria and Madalya, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macorna North has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Madalya (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macorna North or Madalya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macorna North has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Madalya scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macorna North scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Madalya scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macorna North or Madalya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macorna North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
